name: 丽江
description: Lijiang is a picturesque city in northwestern Yunnan province, famous for the UNESCO World Heritage-listed Lijiang Old Town with its Naxi architecture and canal system. Nestled between the Himalayas and Yunnan-Guizhou Plateau, it offers stunning natural scenery including Jade Dragon Snow Mountain and the peaceful beauty of Lugu Lake. Home to the Naxi, Bai, Yi, and other ethnic minorities with rich cultural traditions.
highlights: Lijiang Old Town - UNESCO World Heritage
Jade Dragon Snow Mountain - Stunning peaks
Shaxi Ancient Town - Authentic Naxi culture

climate.tips: Spring and autumn are best with mild weather and clear skies. Summer is rainy but lush green. Winter is dry and sunny but cold at night. UV is very strong year-round due to altitude. Jade Dragon Snow Mountain is cold even in summer - bring layers.

restaurants.name: 纳西妈妈家
restaurants.description: Traditional Naxi family-run restaurant with authentic home-cooked dishes and warm atmosphere in old town alley.
restaurants.tips: Best for authentic Naxi food experience. The family is very welcoming. Try the 'Naxi combo' set meal. Arrive before 7pm for dinner.

restaurants.name: 牦牛肉火锅城
restaurants.description: Famous restaurant specializing in yak meat hotpot and grilled yak meat dishes, using local highland yaks.
restaurants.tips: Yak meat is lean and healthy. The hotpot broth is delicious. Share a hotpot between two people. Reservation recommended for dinner.

restaurants.name: 古城小吃街
restaurants.description: Night market in old town with various Yunnan and Lijiang local snacks including grilled meats, noodles, and sweets.
restaurants.address: Near Sifang Street, Lijiang Old Town
restaurants.tips: Great for trying variety of snacks. Sample a bit of everything. Bring tissue - no napkins often. Watch hygiene - pick stalls with locals. Cash preferred.

restaurants.name: 腊排骨火锅
restaurants.description: Iconic Lijiang dish featuring fermented pork ribs (腊排骨) slow-cooked in broth with local vegetables.
restaurants.address: Old Town and New Town locations
restaurants.tips: The signature Lijiang dish - must try. Many restaurants serve it - ask locals for recommendations. The broth is salty - dilute with water. Feeds 2-3 people per pot.

restaurants.name: 高原青稞屋
restaurants.description: Tibetan restaurant serving highland barley noodles, yak butter tea, and traditional Tibetan dishes in cozy atmosphere.
restaurants.tips: Good introduction to Tibetan cuisine. The butter tea is an acquired taste - try it. The hotpot is milder than Sichuan style. Good for cold nights.

restaurants.name: 纳西古乐宴
restaurants.description: Dinner with traditional Naxi ancient music performance, combining authentic local cuisine with cultural experience.
restaurants.tips: Book through hotel or tourist info. More expensive than regular dining but includes show. Arrive on time for performance. Good for first-time visitors.

restaurants.name: 花鸟市场小吃
restaurants.description: Local market serving authentic Lijiang breakfast foods and snacks, popular with locals since dawn.
restaurants.address: Flower and Bird Market, New City
restaurants.tips: Best for breakfast. Arrive before 9am for freshest items. Very local - English menu unlikely. Great photo opportunities of market life.

restaurants.name: 丽江咖啡馆
restaurants.description: Western-style cafe near old town serving coffee, pastries, and light meals. Popular with expats and tourists.
restaurants.tips: Good for breakfast when tired of Chinese food. The apple pie is excellent. WiFi and charging available. Popular with digital nomads.

restaurants.name: 野生菌火锅
restaurants.description: Premium wild mushroom hotpot using seasonal varieties from Yunnan highlands, served with safety certification.
restaurants.tips: Only during mushroom season (June-Nov). Price varies by mushroom type. The restaurant verifies mushroom safety. Reservation required.

restaurants.name: 纳西阁
restaurants.description: Upscale Naxi restaurant in traditional courtyard setting serving refined local cuisine with elegant presentation.
restaurants.tips: Best for special occasions. The courtyard setting is beautiful. Book window seats for atmosphere. Good wine selection.

restaurants.name: 桥头米线
restaurants.description: Local favorite for rice noodles (米线) in rich broth, famous in Lijiang for generous portions and fresh ingredients.
restaurants.address: Near Black Dragon Bridge, Old Town
restaurants.tips: Popular with locals - line up at lunch. Quick and cheap. The beef noodle is good. Open only until 2pm - plan accordingly.

restaurants.name: 丽江烧烤一条街
restaurants.description: Street lined with BBQ vendors serving grilled meats, vegetables, and skewers in casual outdoor setting.
restaurants.tips: Best after dark. Try various skewers - order small amounts. Local Lijiang beer (丽江啤酒) is good. Informal and fun atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 丝绸之路餐厅
restaurants.description: Restaurant serving Muslim-influenced cuisine from China's northwest, including hand-pulled noodles and lamb dishes.
restaurants.tips: Good alternative to Yunnan food. The hand-pulled noodles are freshly made. No pork - Muslim restaurant. Large portions.

restaurants.name: 云雪岭餐厅
restaurants.description: Modern Yunnan fusion restaurant using local ingredients with contemporary cooking techniques in elegant setting.
restaurants.tips: Good when seeking refined dining. The presentations are Instagram-worthy. Book rooftop tables for old town views. Pricey but quality.

restaurants.name: 玉龙山脚下农家乐
restaurants.description: Farm restaurant at foot of Jade Dragon Mountain serving fresh vegetables, free-range chickens, and local specialties.
restaurants.tips: Best combined with mountain visit. The chicken is excellent. The view of mountain from table is special. Ask locally for directions.

restaurants.name: 妈妈餐厅
restaurants.description: Simple home-style restaurant run by local Naxi family, serving honest home-cooked food without tourist markups.
restaurants.tips: Hidden in old town alleys - explore to find. The family doesn't speak much English. Point at what others are eating. Authentic local experience.

restaurants.name: 丽江火锅王
restaurants.description: Popular hotpot restaurant combining Sichuan-style and local Lijiang broths with quality meat and vegetable selections.
restaurants.tips: Very popular with locals. All-you-can-eat is good value on weekends. The dual-flavor pot is recommended. Bring appetite.

restaurants.name: 古城茶馆
restaurants.description: Traditional Naxi teahouse in old town courtyard serving Yunnan pu'er tea, flower tea, and light snacks.
restaurants.tips: Good for afternoon rest. The pu'er is authentic Yunnan tea. Sit in courtyard for atmosphere. Ask for tea tasting flight.

restaurants.name: 藏民人家
restaurants.description: Authentic Tibetan-run restaurant serving highland cuisine including tsampa, yak meat, and barley wine.
restaurants.tips: Best after Snow Mountain visit. The Tibetan family is very welcoming. Try tsampa with yak butter. The yak meat stew is hearty.

restaurants.name: 丽江腊排骨大王
restaurants.description: The most famous restaurant for Lijiang's signature cured pork ribs hotpot, known for authentic recipe and quality ingredients.
restaurants.tips: Best known for cured pork ribs hotpot. The broth is salty - dilute with water. Share pot between 2-3 people. Arrive early to avoid queues.

restaurants.name: 丽江菌菇苑
restaurants.description: Premium wild mushroom hotpot restaurant with seasonal varieties from Yunnan highlands, safety-certified and quality guaranteed.
restaurants.tips: Only open during mushroom season. Book in advance. Ask about today's mushroom selection. Price varies by mushroom type.

restaurants.name: 丽江天台咖啡馆
restaurants.description: Popular cafe with rooftop views of Lijiang Old Town and Jade Dragon Mountain, serving coffee, Western food, and cocktails.
restaurants.tips: Best for sunset views. Arrive early to claim rooftop seats. Good WiFi for digital nomads. Popular with expats and tourists.

restaurants.name: 酥油茶馆
restaurants.description: Authentic Tibetan teahouse serving yak butter tea, tsampa, and traditional Tibetan snacks in traditional setting.
restaurants.tips: Good introduction to Tibetan culture. The butter tea is salty - acquired taste. Try tsampa with honey. Very authentic experience.

restaurants.name: 古城早餐店
restaurants.description: Local breakfast spot serving authentic Naxi morning dishes including soybean milk, fried dough sticks, and steamed buns.
restaurants.tips: Best breakfast in old town. Opens very early. Very local - English menu unlikely. Great for authentic local experience.

restaurants.name: 纳西婆婆厨房
restaurants.description: Family-run restaurant with grandmother cooking traditional Naxi dishes using recipes passed down through generations.
restaurants.tips: Hidden gem in old town. The grandmother cooks everything herself. No English menu - point at what others are eating. Very authentic.

restaurants.name: 雪山观景餐厅
restaurants.description: Restaurant at foot of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain with stunning mountain views from large windows, serving local cuisine.
restaurants.tips: Best combined with snow mountain visit. Book window table for views. The view while eating is unforgettable. Prices are touristy.

restaurants.name: 丽江武林食府
restaurants.description: Themed restaurant with martial arts decor serving Yunnan cuisine, known for creative dishes and traditional atmosphere.
restaurants.tips: Fun atmosphere with martial arts theme. Good for families. The performances are entertaining. Book in advance for shows.

restaurants.name: 古城红酒坊
restaurants.description: Cozy wine bar in old town courtyard serving Yunnan highland wines, imported wines, and light Western food.
restaurants.tips: Great for evening relaxation. The Yunnan wines are unique. Try the highland wine tasting flight. Very romantic atmosphere.

hotels.name: 丽江古城客栈
hotels.description: Luxury boutique hotel in restored Naxi courtyard with elegant rooms, private gardens, and premium service.
hotels.tips: Book months ahead for peak season. The courtyard design is unique. Some rooms have Jade Dragon Mountain views. Excellent service.

hotels.name: 书蔓精品酒店
hotels.description: Stylish boutique hotel near old town with modern design mixed with Naxi elements and thoughtful amenities.
hotels.tips: Popular with young travelers. The rooftop is great for drinks. Book direct for discount. Good balance of modern and traditional.

hotels.name: 玉龙雪山度假酒店
hotels.description: Upscale resort at foot of Jade Dragon Mountain with stunning peak views, spa, and nature experiences.
hotels.tips: Best for nature lovers. Rent a car recommended. The mountain views from room are unforgettable. Quieter than old town.

hotels.name: 丽江客栈
hotels.description: Charming mid-range hotel in old town with traditional Naxi architecture, comfortable rooms, and local character.
hotels.tips: Best location in old town. The courtyard is charming. Some noise from street at night. Book river-view rooms.

hotels.name: 泸沽湖度假酒店
hotels.description: Lakeside resort overlooking Lugu Lake with traditional Mosuo architecture, serene atmosphere, and cultural experiences.
hotels.tips: Stay overnight - day trip is too short. Book lake-view rooms. The sunrise is magical. Mosquitoes in summer.

hotels.name: 束河古镇客栈
hotels.description: Authentic Naxi inn in quieter Shaxi Ancient Town, offering peaceful atmosphere and traditional accommodation experience.
hotels.tips: Best for escaping old town crowds. Book directly for best rates. The innkeepers are very friendly. Explore town after day-trippers leave.

hotels.name: 丽江新城酒店
hotels.description: Modern mid-range hotel in new city area with comfortable rooms, reliable service, and good breakfast.
hotels.tips: Good option if old town noise is concern. Near markets and restaurants. Parking available. Weekend discounts.

hotels.name: 丽江青年旅舍
hotels.description: Popular backpacker hostel in old town with dorms, private rooms, rooftop bar, and social atmosphere.
hotels.tips: Best for solo travelers. The rooftop bar is famous. Evening social events. Book dorms well ahead in peak season.

hotels.name: 虎跳峡客栈
hotels.description: Mountain guesthouse along Tiger Leaping Gorge hiking trail with basic but comfortable rooms and mountain views.
hotels.address: Tiger Leaping Gorge, along hiking trail
hotels.tips: Book during hiking season (Apr-Jun, Sep-Nov). The views are stunning. Basic but clean. Hiking experience essential.

hotels.name: 拉市海酒店
hotels.description: Lakefront hotel near Lashi Sea with scenic views, horse riding services, and nature experiences.
hotels.tips: Combine with Lashi Sea activities. The lake is beautiful at sunset. Stay overnight for bird watching. Mosquitoes in summer.

hotels.name: 纳西小筑
hotels.description: Elegant boutique hotel in restored Naxi heritage building with artistic decor and personalized service.
hotels.tips: The building itself is a reason to stay. The art collection is impressive. Staff can arrange cultural experiences. Book early.

hotels.name: 蓝月谷酒店
hotels.description: Upscale hotel near Blue Moon Valley with modern amenities and views of the glacial valley and surrounding mountains.
hotels.address: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Scenic Area
hotels.tips: Best location for Blue Moon Valley and Snow Mountain. Heated rooms for cold mountain nights. Book with snow mountain tour packages.

hotels.name: 丽江机场酒店
hotels.description: Convenient hotel directly at Lijiang Sanyi Airport, ideal for early morning flights or late arrivals.
hotels.tips: Best for transit passengers. Book directly with hotel. Early morning flights - stay here night before. Simple but convenient.

hotels.name: 丽江大饭店
hotels.description: Large upscale hotel in new city with comprehensive facilities, multiple restaurants, and professional service.
hotels.tips: Good for business travelers. The buffet breakfast is excellent. Weekend discounts available. Modern and reliable.

hotels.name: 丽江花园酒店
hotels.description: Quiet garden hotel near old town with beautiful courtyard, Naxi style rooms, and peaceful atmosphere.
hotels.tips: Good alternative if old town is too noisy. The garden is beautiful. Walk to old town in 10 minutes. Best value in area.

hotels.name: 纳西文化酒店
hotels.description: Heritage hotel in restored Naxi compound featuring authentic architecture, cultural activities, and traditional atmosphere.
hotels.tips: Stay overnight to experience Naxi culture. The courtyard is beautiful. Staff can arrange cultural experiences. Book months ahead.

hotels.name: 雪山脚下客栈
hotels.description: Simple guesthouse at foot of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain with basic rooms, mountain views, and local character.
hotels.tips: Best for budget travelers visiting snow mountain. Basic but clean. Mountain views from room. Book early for peak season.

hotels.name: 丽江王府酒店
hotels.description: Luxury hotel modeled after Mufu Palace architecture with premium rooms, spa, and cultural experiences.
hotels.tips: Best luxury option in old town. The architecture is impressive. Book direct for discounts. Excellent service and location.

hotels.name: 丽江民族酒店
hotels.description: Ethnic-themed hotel with minority cultural decorations, offering unique Yunnan minority experience.
hotels.tips: Good balance of ethnic character and modern comfort. The decoration is interesting. Good breakfast included. Best value.

hotels.name: 束河精品客栈
hotels.description: Charming boutique inn in Shaxi Ancient Town with Naxi architecture, peaceful atmosphere, and personalized service.
hotels.tips: Best for escaping old town crowds. The innkeepers are very welcoming. Explore town after day-trippers leave. Book directly.

hotels.name: 泸沽湖半岛酒店
hotels.description: Upscale lakeside hotel on a peninsula offering stunning lake views, Mosuo architecture, and serene atmosphere.
hotels.tips: Best location at Lugu Lake. The sunrise views are magical. Stay overnight minimum. Book lake-view rooms. Mosquitoes in summer.

emergencyContacts.name: 丽江市旅游执法支队
emergencyContacts.description: Report illegal tourism activities, price disputes

emergencyContacts.name: 丽江高山救援
emergencyContacts.description: Mountain rescue for Jade Dragon Snow Mountain and hiking areas

emergencyContacts.name: 丽江市气象局
emergencyContacts.description: Weather forecasts and mountain weather specifically

emergencyContacts.name: 丽江森林防火指挥部
emergencyContacts.description: Forest fire reporting for Lijiang area

emergencyContacts.name: 泸沽湖派出所
emergencyContacts.description: Police coverage for Lugu Lake area

emergencyContacts.name: 虎跳峡救援
emergencyContacts.description: Rescue services for Tiger Leaping Gorge hiking area

emergencyContacts.name: 丽江火车站服务
emergencyContacts.description: Railway ticket inquiries and station services

culturalTips.title: 纳西族文化
culturalTips.content: 丽江是纳西族聚居地，他们有独特的东巴文化，包括世界上唯一仍在使用的象形文字。东巴文化强调人与自然和谐相处。

culturalTips.title: 摩梭人走婚文化
culturalTips.content: 泸沽湖地区居住着摩梭人，他们保留着母系社会的'走婚'传统。游客应尊重这一文化，不应以猎奇心态看待。

culturalTips.title: 古城游览礼仪
culturalTips.content: 丽江古城是UNESCO遗产，游览时请保持安静，不要在室内吸烟。古城木质结构多，防火意识要强。部分区域需要购票进入。

culturalTips.title: 玉龙雪山圣山
culturalTips.content: 玉龙雪山是纳西族神山，被视为天堂的阶梯。请尊重当地宗教信仰，不要在山上大声喧哗或做出不敬行为。

culturalTips.title: 虎跳峡徒步礼仪
culturalTips.content: 虎跳峡是世界上最深的峡谷之一，徒步时请走指定步道，不要离开步道进入未开发区域。注意落石标志，安全第一。

culturalTips.title: 东巴文字
culturalTips.content: 东巴文是目前世界上唯一广泛使用的象形文字，可以学习写自己的名字作为纪念。在古城很多地方可以找到东巴文化体验。

culturalTips.title: 纳西古乐
culturalTips.content: 纳西古乐已有上千年历史，演奏者是当地老人。演出每晚在古城举行，是了解纳西文化的好机会。

culturalTips.title: 高原紫外线
culturalTips.content: 丽江海拔2400米，紫外线强烈。即使阴天也要涂防晒霜，戴太阳镜和帽子。高原干燥，多喝水。

culturalTips.title: 高原反应预防
culturalTips.content: 丽江海拔较高（2400米），初到可能会有轻微高原反应。多休息，少运动，多喝水。前往雪山时反应可能更明显。

culturalTips.title: 茶马古道
culturalTips.content: 丽江曾是茶马古道的重要枢纽，马帮从这里前往西藏和东南亚。古城里可以看到当年马帮文化的遗迹。

culturalTips.title: 纳西饮食文化
culturalTips.content: 纳西菜口味偏辣，常用腌制食品。腊排骨是丽江名菜，米灌肠也很特色。不要错过当地的野生菌火锅（雨季）。

culturalTips.title: 摄影礼仪
culturalTips.content: 拍摄当地人或民族服饰前请先征得同意。纳西老人有时不喜欢被拍照，尤其是东巴祭司。山上的经幡和白塔也要先问再拍。

culturalTips.title: 古城水系
culturalTips.content: 丽江古城水系从玉龙雪山引水，穿城而过。游客不应在河沟里洗东西或丢弃杂物。冬天水会结冰，是别样风景。

culturalTips.title: 纳西族禁忌
culturalTips.content: 纳西族有一些传统禁忌：不要用脚踏锅灶，不要在产妇房前逗留，不要在家中唱纳西情歌。这些禁忌正在逐渐淡化，但尊重仍是必要的。

culturalTips.title: 购物还价
culturalTips.content: 在古城购物还价是文化的一部分。通常可以还到标价的40-60%。从友善的交谈开始，保持微笑，以建立良好关系。

culturalTips.title: 藏族文化影响
culturalTips.content: 丽江靠近藏区，受藏族文化影响显著。玉龙雪山周边有藏传佛教寺庙和转经筒，请保持安静和尊重。

culturalTips.title: 丽江夜生活
culturalTips.content: 古城夜晚有酒吧街，但晚上10点后请降低音量，不要影响古城居民休息。纳西老人需要早睡早起的生活。

culturalTips.title: 东巴教信仰
culturalTips.content: 纳西族信奉东巴教，这是以自然崇拜为核心的宗教。请尊重东巴祭司，他们在古城进行宗教活动时请不要打扰。

culturalTips.title: 古城水系历史
culturalTips.content: 丽江古城水系从玉龙雪山引水，由明代木氏土司设计。水系有灌溉、防火、生活三重功能，体现了纳西人的智慧。

culturalTips.title: 纳西织锦文化
culturalTips.content: 纳西族有精湛的织锦传统，纳西女性的披星戴月服饰是著名标志。购买织锦产品时可以还价，但请尊重手工艺价值。

culturalTips.title: 摩梭母系社会
culturalTips.content: 泸沽湖摩梭人保留母系社会制度，家庭以女性为中心。走婚制度下，男方夜间来访天亮离开，孩子由女方家庭抚养。

culturalTips.title: 丽江玫瑰产业
culturalTips.content: 丽江玫瑰产业发达，玫瑰饼、玫瑰糖、玫瑰酒都是特色产品。食用玫瑰种植在玉龙雪山脚下，品质优良。

culturalTips.title: 玉龙雪山宗教意义
culturalTips.content: 玉龙雪山在纳西语中意为'天山'，是纳西族保护神三多的化身。山上有藏传佛教寺庙，转经筒和经幡是常见元素。

culturalTips.title: 虎跳峡徒步安全
culturalTips.content: 虎跳峡徒步有一定风险，7-8月雨季可能有泥石流。徒步时请走正规步道，不要离开步道进入未开发区域。建议雇当地向导。

culturalTips.title: 纳西手工艺品
culturalTips.content: 纳西扎染、东巴木雕、银饰是主要手工艺品。购买时请认准手工艺人作品，避免买到机器批量生产的产品。

culturalTips.title: 腊排骨腌制传统
culturalTips.content: 腊排骨是丽江名菜，猪排骨用盐和香料腌制后风干。传统做法需要腌制一个月以上，才能形成独特的风味。

culturalTips.title: 纳西古乐保护
culturalTips.content: 纳西古乐是联合国非物质文化遗产，由纳西老人传承演奏。这些乐曲源自唐代，有些已失传于中原，在丽江保存下来。

culturalTips.title: 丽江高原健康
culturalTips.content: 丽江海拔2400米，部分游客可能有高原反应。多喝水，避免剧烈运动，如有严重头疼或呼吸困难请立即就医。

culturalTips.title: 茶马古道商贸
culturalTips.content: 丽江曾是茶马古道重要枢纽，马帮从这里前往西藏和东南亚。古城的四方街就是当年马帮交易的市场。

culturalTips.title: 纳西丝绸传统
culturalTips.content: 纳西族有养蚕织绸的传统，纳西服饰中的'披星戴月'七星披肩就是用自织布料制成。现在这种传统技艺正在复兴。

culturalTips.title: 摩梭猪槽船
culturalTips.content: 泸沽湖的猪槽船是摩梭人传统水上交通工具，用整根木头凿成。乘船游湖是体验泸沽湖的最佳方式。

culturalTips.title: 雪山摄影礼仪
culturalTips.content: 拍摄玉龙雪山最好在清晨，这时云雾少，能看到山峰全貌。山顶经常有云雾遮挡，请耐心等待。

culturalTips.title: 鲜花饼的由来
culturalTips.content: 鲜花饼是丽江特色小吃，用新鲜玫瑰花瓣和面粉制成。清乾隆年间开始流行，是茶马古道马帮的便携干粮。

culturalTips.title: 纳西族家庭结构
culturalTips.content: 传统纳西族家庭以女性为主，家务和农活主要由女性承担。男性负责手工艺和赶马帮，这种分工延续至今。

culturalTips.title: 印象丽江创作
culturalTips.content: 《印象丽江》由著名导演张艺谋执导，在玉龙雪山脚下实景演出。500名演员都是当地纳西族和少数民族。

culturalTips.title: 丽江药材文化
culturalTips.content: 丽江是云南重要药材产地，天麻、三七、虫草等都有出产。购买药材请到正规店铺，注意辨别真伪。

culturalTips.title: 纳西烤肉传统
culturalTips.content: 纳西烤肉用炭火烤制猪肉条，是下酒好菜。传统做法要在野外用松木炭火慢烤，现在古城餐馆都有供应。

culturalTips.title: 古城建筑保护
culturalTips.content: 丽江古城建筑是木质结构，部分建筑已有数百年历史。请不要在古建筑内使用明火，不要吸烟，共同保护这一世界遗产。

culturalTips.title: 青稞糌粑文化
culturalTips.content: 糌粑是藏族和纳西族的主食，用青稞炒熟后磨成面粉。吃法是将糌粑粉加入酥油茶中搅拌，是高原地区的高热量食物。

culturalTips.title: 摩梭女性地位
culturalTips.content: 摩梭社会以女性为核心，家庭财产由女性继承。家中最年长的女性掌管家庭事务，男性是舅舅角色协助抚养外甥。

culturalTips.title: 牦牛肉饮食
culturalTips.content: 丽江周边高原牧区养牦牛，牦牛肉是当地特色。高原牦牛生长缓慢，肉质紧实，富含蛋白质，是健康食材。

culturalTips.title: 纳西东巴文
culturalTips.content: 东巴文是世界上唯一仍在使用的象形文字，目前有1400多个字符。在古城可以学习写东巴文，制作专属纪念品。

culturalTips.title: 丽江天气建议
culturalTips.content: 丽江天气变化快，一天内可能有四季。雨季(6-8月)常有大雨，雪季(12-2月)玉龙雪山有积雪。出行前查看天气预报。

payment.name: 支付宝
payment.description: Most widely accepted mobile payment in Lijiang
tips: Works at almost all hotels, restaurants, and shops in Lijiang. Download and link card before arrival. Some small vendors may prefer WeChat.
howToUse: Works at almost all hotels, restaurants, and shops in Lijiang. Download and link card before arrival. Some small vendors may prefer WeChat.

payment.name: 微信支付
payment.description: Essential for communication and payment, accepted everywhere Alipay is
tips: WeChat is more than payment - it's how people communicate. WeChat Pay works at most merchants. Both are equally accepted.
howToUse: WeChat is more than payment - it's how people communicate. WeChat Pay works at most merchants. Both are equally accepted.

payment.name: 现金
payment.description: Still needed for small vendors, markets, and some remote areas
tips: Carry 300-500¥ for markets, small shops, and tips. ATMs are available in old town and new city. Lugu Lake and Tiger Leaping Gorge may require cash.
howToUse: Carry 300-500¥ for markets, small shops, and tips. ATMs are available in old town and new city. Lugu Lake and Tiger Leaping Gorge may require cash.

payment.name: 银联卡
payment.description: Accepted at banks, large hotels, and some restaurants
tips: ATMs accepting foreign cards available at Agricultural Bank and Bank of China in new city. Inform your bank of travel plans first.
howToUse: ATMs accepting foreign cards available at Agricultural Bank and Bank of China in new city. Inform your bank of travel plans first.

payment.name: Visa/Mastercard
payment.description: Only accepted at large international hotels and some upscale restaurants
tips: Don't rely on international cards in Lijiang. Some high-end hotels may accept them. Carry sufficient mobile payment or cash instead.
howToUse: Don't rely on international cards in Lijiang. Some high-end hotels may accept them. Carry sufficient mobile payment or cash instead.

payment.name: 旅行支票
tips: Traveler's cheques are not practical in Lijiang. Avoid bringing them. If you have some, exchange at Bank of China in new city.
howToUse: Traveler's cheques are not practical in Lijiang. Avoid bringing them. If you have some, exchange at Bank of China in new city.

arrival.name: 丽江三义国际机场
arrival.description: Main airport serving Lijiang, located 28km from city center in Yunnan's mountainous region
arrival.toCityCenter: Airport bus (25¥, 40-60 min) or taxi (120-150¥, 40 min)
highlights: Flights to Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Chengdu

arrival.name: 丽江站
arrival.description: Main railway station for high-speed trains connecting to Dali, Kunming, and other destinations
arrival.toCityCenter: Bus 4 or 18 (2¥, 30 min) or taxi (30-50¥, 20 min)

arrival.name: 丽江客运站
arrival.description: Main bus station for long-distance buses to destinations around Yunnan
arrival.toCityCenter: Walking distance to old town (15 min) or taxi (15¥)

arrival.name: 丽江高快客运站
arrival.description: Express bus station for comfortable long-distance travel

bus: Bus network connecting old town, new city, and surrounding areas
taxi: Didi works in Lijiang for English users
Negotiate if no meter in rural areas
rental: Old town has electric cart system
To Jade Dragon Snow Mountain scenic area
Useful for those with luggage to railway station
To Jade Dragon Snow Mountain (package deals available)
Book through hotel or tour desk
bike: Good for Shaxi Ancient Town area
Beware of traffic on main roads

quickFacts.water: Tap water is boiled before drinking; bottled water widely available
